perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments, however, responsibility for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein will be shared equally among all signatories. Each party is fully responsible for all information contained within the filing, regardless of who provided it.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating that responsibility for the completeness and accuracy of information is now shared equally, directly contradicting the original statement that each party is only responsible for their own information. This creates uncertainty regarding liability for inaccuracies. The contradiction is that signatories where only responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein, but now it will be shared equally among all signatories.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the statement on Schedule 13G with respect to the equity securities of Q Biomed, Inc. is, and any amendment thereto signed by each of the undersigned shall be, filed on behalf of each of the undersigned pursuant to and in accordance with the provisions of Rule 13d-1(k) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended. The undersigned hereby further agree that this Joint Filing Agreement be included as an exhibit to such statement and any such amendment. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments, however, responsibility for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein will be shared equally among all signatories. Each party is fully responsible for all information contained within the filing, regardless of who provided it. This Joint Filing Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, all of which taken together shall constitute one and the same instrument.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction by stating that responsibility for the completeness and accuracy of information is now shared equally among all signatories. The original text explicitly states that each party is only responsible for their own information. This is a clear and impactful contradiction that creates uncertainty regarding liability for inaccuracies within the 'Contradicted Text' section. The change clearly breaks the previous arrangement of individual responsibility.

perturbation.original_text: This Joint Filing Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, all of which taken together shall constitute one and the same instrument.
perturbation.changed_text: This Joint Filing Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, however, each counterpart shall be considered a separate and distinct agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating that each counterpart is now considered a separate agreement, directly contradicting the original statement that all counterparts constitute one and the same instrument. This creates uncertainty regarding the enforceability and interpretation of the agreement if counterparts contain differing terms or are not identical.The contradiction is that the counterparts where considered the same intrument but they are now different.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the statement on Schedule 13G with respect to the equity securities of Q Biomed, Inc. is, and any amendment thereto signed by each of the undersigned shall be, filed on behalf of each of the undersigned pursuant to and in accordance with the provisions of Rule 13d-1(k) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended. The undersigned hereby further agree that this Joint Filing Agreement be included as an exhibit to such statement and any such amendment. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others. This Joint Filing Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, however, each counterpart shall be considered a separate and distinct agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that each counterpart shall be considered a separate and distinct agreement, which directly contradicts the original text and the contradicted text, both of which state that all counterparts constitute one and the same instrument. This creates a strong contradiction because it introduces uncertainty and potential legal issues regarding the interpretation and enforceability of the agreement if the counterparts are not identical. This aligns with the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition provided.

perturbation.original_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the statement on Schedule 13G with respect to the equity securities of Q Biomed, Inc. is, and any amendment thereto signed by each of the undersigned shall be, filed on behalf of each of the undersigned pursuant to and in accordance with the provisions of Rule 13d-1(k) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the statement on Schedule 13G with respect to the equity securities of Q Biomed, Inc. *may* be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned. Filing is at the discretion of each undersigned party, and they are to act under their own interpretations of Rule 13d-1(k).
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by replacing the mandatory 'shall be filed' with the permissive 'may be filed,' and then indicating they are to act under their own interpretations of the rule, effectively making the filing optional and removing the binding agreement to file jointly. This contradicts the purpose of a joint filing agreement and adds the ambiguity that the filing is no longer required. The first sentence imposes an obligation and the new sentence contradicts that, creating uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned hereby agree that the statement on Schedule 13G with respect to the equity securities of Q Biomed, Inc. *may* be filed on behalf of each of the undersigned. Filing is at the discretion of each undersigned party, and they are to act under their own interpretations of Rule 13d-1(k) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended. The undersigned hereby further agree that this Joint Filing Agreement be included as an exhibit to such statement and any such amendment. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of such amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning him or it contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others. This Joint Filing Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, all of which taken together shall constitute one and the same instrument.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'shall be filed' to 'may be filed' directly contradicts the previously agreed-upon mandatory action of joint filing. The addition that parties are to act under their own interpretations further exacerbates this contradiction by creating ambiguity where there was certainty. This directly conflicts with the original intent of a joint filing agreement, where a unified action is expected. The contradicted text itself now reflects this ambiguity, indicating a strong, in-text contradiction, and is also not consistent with the explanation provided, as they directly conflict.
